Off Calendar Aug-04-2010 Off Calendar

Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar May-12-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER THE BOARD OF TRUSTEES Hearing on Petition to Confirm Arbitration Award. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Petition to confirm arbitration award is granted. No opposition filed. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) (302/EHG)Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Court Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489
